query: SELECT cnj, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps') as steps_sample, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) as steps_count FROM processos WHERE raw_payload IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) > 0 ORDER BY JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yf9iEUYDgMjHK2N.90ae4898ae71 --database FUtgBwVe3SdFnru4LzrCjK --execute SELECT cnj, JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps') as steps_sample, JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) as steps_count FROM processos WHERE raw_payload IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) > 0 ORDER BY JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_payload, '$.steps')) DESC LIMIT 3;
